description_long: This rifle features a robust, angular design with a two-tone color scheme of tan and black, giving it a modern tactical appearance. The stock is fixed and slightly contoured for shoulder support, while the pistol grip and foregrip are ergonomically shaped for improved handling. The receiver and handguard are constructed from metal, with visible rails for mounting accessories. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a prominent flash hider. The magazine is a detachable box type, seamlessly integrated into the lower receiver. Iron sights are mounted on the top rail, providing basic aiming capability.
description: A modern, tan and black tactical rifle with a fixed stock, long barrel, detachable box magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the fixed stock, long barrel, and flash hider.
description_view_1: Angled view from the front right, emphasizing the muzzle, flash hider, and ergonomic foregrip.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, clearly displaying the magazine, pistol grip, and receiver details.
description_view_3: Rear angled view, focusing on the stock's contour and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
